name: Xylem Inc.
business: Xylem is a leading global water technology company with 2025 revenues of $9.0 billion. It designs, manufactures and services engineered products and solutions for water and wastewater applications, serving utilities, industrial, residential and commercial customers.
sellsTo: industrial facilities (e.g., food and beverage, pharmaceutical)

exposures.sentence: Our customer base includes water and wastewater utilities that supply, treat and monitor clean water or transport, treat and analyze wastewater or storm water through an infrastructure network, and engineering, procurement and construction ("EPC") firms and third-party contractors, that work with utilities to design and build water and wastewater infrastructure networks.
We provide analytical instrumentation used to measure and analyze water quality, flow and level in clean water, wastewater and outdoor water environments.
At the heart of our offering is the FlexNet communication network, which provides a common communication platform and infrastructure for essential metering services.
Xylem Vue is a unified software analytics platform built for water utilities to manage their operations from end-to-end.

We also provide distinct technologies, services, and application expertise to a wide array of entities, including farms, mines, power plants, industrial facilities, such as food and beverage and pharmaceutical manufacturers, and residential and commercial customers seeking to address similar trends.

Competitors may develop and commercialize new technologies, such as AI, more effectively to drive internal efficiencies or create new or enhanced products or services that may adversely affect our competitiveness.
Parts, components and raw materials commonly used in our products include... rare earth minerals.

Parts, components and raw materials commonly used in our products include motors, fabricated parts, castings, magnets, bearings, seals, batteries, printed circuit boards ("PCBs") and electronic components, including semiconductors.

Cybersecurity incidents, data breaches, or other disruptions, and software and system implementations involving our enterprise or operational information technology, connected products and services, or information technology on which we or our customers rely, could materially and adversely affect our business.

catalysts.event: Recognition of approximately 60% of backlog as revenue in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate that approximately 60% of the backlog at December 31, 2025 will be recognized as revenue during 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected annual net savings of $80-$120 million from restructuring beginning in 2026
catalysts.sentence: As a result of the actions initiated in 2025, we achieved savings of approximately $29 million in 2025 and estimate annual future net savings beginning in 2026 of approximately $80 million to $120 million, the majority of which is expected to be realized in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market of global water industry is approximately $800 billion
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the total addressable market size of the global water industry, excluding operational expenditures related to labor, energy, and chemicals, to be approximately $800 billion.
